zh.lifeSummary: Alice FitzWarin是Sir Matthew Furneaux和Maud Raleigh的女兒，出生在英國。她於大約1300年與Sir Hugh Longland結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1330年在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice FitzWarin是Sir Matthew Furneaux和Maud Raleigh的女儿，出生在英国。她于大约1300年与Sir Hugh Longland结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1330年在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: Alice FitzWarin was born in England as the daughter of Sir Matthew Furneaux and Maud Raleigh. She married Sir Hugh Longland about 1300. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1330, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice FitzWarin est née à Angleterre, fille de Sir Matthew Furneaux et Maud Raleigh. Elle a épousé Sir Hugh Longland environ 1300. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1330, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Alice FitzWarin wurde in England, als Tochter von Sir Matthew Furneaux und Maud Raleigh geboren. Sie hat um 1300 Sir Hugh Longland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1330 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Alice FitzWarin è nata il nel England come figlia di Sir Matthew Furneaux e Maud Raleigh. Lei sposato Sir Hugh Longland circa 1300. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1330, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice FitzWarinはイギリスでSir Matthew FurneauxとMaud Raleighの娘として生まれた。約1300年にSir Hugh Longlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1330年に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice FitzWarin(은)는 영국에서 Sir Matthew Furneaux(와)과 Maud Raleigh의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1300년 Sir Hugh Longland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1330년 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alice FitzWarin nasceu em Inglaterra filha de Sir Matthew Furneaux e Maud Raleigh. Ela casou-se com Sir Hugh Longland aproximadamente 1300. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1330, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice FitzWarin родилась в местности Англия. Её родителей звали Sir Matthew Furneaux и Maud Raleigh. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugh Longland около 1300 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1330 г. в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Alice FitzWarin nació en Inglaterra como hija de Sir Matthew Furneaux y Maud Raleigh. Se casó con Sir Hugh Longland aproximadamente 1300. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1330, en su pueblo.
